---
title: "Composable, Sound Transformations of Nested Recursion and Loops"
date: 2019-06-08
year: 2019
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3314221.3314592"
venue: "PLDI 2019"
code: "https://github.com/kirshanthans/polyrec"
slides: "files/slides/pldi2019a.pptx"
preprint: "https://docs.lib.purdue.edu/ecetr/756/"
video: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gueEan6ssYY&ab_channel=ACMSIGPLAN"
author:
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
